comingSoonDialog.title: Coming Soon
comingSoonDialog.description: Predefined integrations are on the way. Check back soon!

list.noIntegrationsMessage: Create your first integration to get started.

createCustomDialog.title: Add Custom Integration
createCustomDialog.description: Connect to a custom MCP server by providing its URL and authentication details.
createCustomDialog.name: Name
createCustomDialog.nameDescription: A friendly name for this integration
createCustomDialog.serverUrlDescription: The URL of your MCP server endpoint
createCustomDialog.authMethodDescription: Select an authentication method if required
createCustomDialog.headerNameDescription: The HTTP header name for authentication
createCustomDialog.noCredentialsRequired: This integration does not require additional credentials.

createSelfDefinedDialog.title: Add Self-defined Integration
createSelfDefinedDialog.description: Create an integration by providing your MCP server URL and configuration schema JSON.
createSelfDefinedDialog.name: Name
createSelfDefinedDialog.nameDescription: A friendly name for this integration
createSelfDefinedDialog.configSchemaHelp: Paste the raw schema JSON. OAuth fields appear automatically when authType is OAUTH.
createSelfDefinedDialog.oauthClientHelp: Required when the config schema enables OAuth.
createSelfDefinedDialog.error: Failed to create self-defined integration. Please try again.
createSelfDefinedDialog.errorInvalidJson: Config schema must be valid JSON.
createSelfDefinedDialog.errorMissingClient: OAuth client ID and secret are required when OAuth is enabled.
createSelfDefinedDialog.errorHeaderCollision: Config schema collides with OAuth Authorization header handling.
createSelfDefinedDialog.errorInvalidServerUrl: Invalid server URL. Please check the URL format.
createSelfDefinedDialog.errorDuplicate: An integration with this URL already exists.

name.maxLength: Name must be 255 characters or less.

description.maxLength: Description must be 2000 characters or less.

serverUrl.isUrl: Server URL must be a valid URL.

oauthClientId.maxLength: OAuth client ID must be 255 characters or less.

editDialog.name: Name
editDialog.headerNameDescription: The HTTP header name for authentication
editDialog.noCredentialsMessage: This integration does not use authentication credentials.
editDialog.configDescription: Update the configuration values for this marketplace integration.
editDialog.secretPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current value

deleteDialog.title: Delete Integration
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

userConfig.title: User Configuration — {{name}}
userConfig.description: Set your personal configuration for this integration. These values override organization defaults.
userConfig.authorizationDescription: Authorize your personal account for this integration before using it in agents or skills.
userConfig.nothingToConfigure: This integration does not require any personal configuration.
userConfig.error: Failed to save user configuration. Please try again.
userConfig.notFound: Integration not found. It may have been deleted.
